description: Prior to becoming General Counsel at Sellafield Ltd, Ian was in-house counsel to the British Nuclear Fuels group, including Sellafield Ltd, Magnox, Westinghouse and Uranium Asset Management from 2000 until joining the law firm DLA as a partner in 2006, moving to King and Wood Mallesons in 2015 and Squire Patton Boggs in 2017. Ian had been involved in advising on and drafting procurement and commercial contracts, with a particular specialism in the nuclear sector. He also has extensive experience in large scale projects in the construction, IT, plant and equipment and service delivery sectors.

details.body:
Prior to becoming General Counsel at Sellafield Ltd, Ian was in-house counsel to the British Nuclear Fuels group, including Sellafield Ltd, Magnox, Westinghouse and Uranium Asset Management from 2000 until joining the law firm DLA as a partner in 2006, moving to King and Wood Mallesons in 2015 and Squire Patton Boggs in 2017.

Ian had been involved in advising on and drafting procurement and commercial contracts, with a particular specialism in the nuclear sector.

He also has extensive experience in large scale projects in the construction, IT, plant and equipment and service delivery sectors.

Prior to becoming General Counsel at Sellafield Ltd, Ian was in-house counsel to the British Nuclear Fuels group, including Sellafield Ltd, Magnox, Westinghouse and Uranium Asset Management from 2000 until joining the law firm DLA as a partner in 2006, moving to King and Wood Mallesons in 2015 and Squire Patton Boggs in 2017.

Ian had been involved in advising on and drafting procurement and commercial contracts, with a particular specialism in the nuclear sector.

He also has extensive experience in large scale projects in the construction, IT, plant and equipment and service delivery sectors.
Vicky’s responsibilities include leading the provision of specialist legal advice and insurance support to the business.

title: Ian Wood
